FIDUCARO
HomeSendDecryptDisruptorGaslessProtocol

FIDUCARO is live on Ethereum mainnet

SEND buries value, Decrypt retrieves hidden balances, and Disruptor projects a visible zero-net Transfer signal. Every command uses real Ethereum execution and requires your wallet approval.

Zero-net transfer signal

Disruptor

shadowDuster(user, recipient, amount) emits a standard Transfer record while reversing both temporary balance adjustments inside the same execution. The Ethereum transaction and event are real; no lasting token balance is transferred.

Displayed sender
Displayed recipient
Displayed amount

Disruptor ready

Enter the displayed sender, recipient, and amount for the shadow send.

Recent on-chain shadow sends

Connect MetaMask to scan recent on-chain shadow sends.

The scanner checks up to the latest 250 Transfer events within 25,000 blocks, then verifies that each transaction called shadowDuster before displaying it.
FIDUCARO

FIDUCARO is a live Ethereum protocol for burying balances, retrieving hidden value, and projecting zero-net transfer signals onto the public record.

Social
@fiducaroprivacy

FIDUCARO — Private value. Public disruption. Live on Ethereum.

Every command is user-approved and executed on chain.
